author: y4rr
content: Surface audit: existing — gpu_conv2d_f32 (PTX im2col+cuBLAS+bias), gpu_matmul_f32, gpu_bmm_f32, gpu_softmax, gpu_silu (f32), gpu_broadcast_add, gpu_add, gpu_scale, gpu_transpose_2d. Missing — GroupNorm f32 (will add as new ferrotorch-gpu module), nearest 2x upsample (will add as new ferrotorch-gpu module). Plan: PTX kernels modeled after LAYERNORM_PTX shape; tests in their own modules; then GpuVaeDecoder mirroring CPU vae::Decoder with CudaBuffer<f32> weights.
